results.title: 03 revised hand halfway peels car
results.prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard bridge frame. Image 1 is the immediately preceding moment and controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, gummy, Peelerz package, careful giant fingertips, and photoreal suburban scale play. Image 2 is the following reveal and controls the tiny blue-gray car, enormous palm, neighborhood, warm light, and curled car peel. Create the exact temporal midpoint. Exterior passenger-side medium wide view. The tiny car rests safely across the giant palm while the other giant hand pinches a loosened rear corner of the roof. One continuous sheet containing half of the blue-gray roof and upper passenger-side body is visibly peeled back and curling upward between thumb and forefinger. The exposed black structural frame, rear seat, lower doors, chassis, and wheels remain intact. Tina stays seated holding the gummy and bag, watching the peel happen. Real flexible painted car skin with a pale translucent underside, not solid torn metal, not a crash, no debris, no contact with Tina, no parachute, no text or watermark.
